nasb.text: It came about, however, when the congregation had assembled against Moses and Aaron, that they turned toward the tent of meeting, and behold, the cloud covered it and the glory of the Lord appeared.

esv.text: And when the congregation had assembled against Moses and against Aaron, they turned toward the tent of meeting. And behold, the cloud covered it, and the glory of the Lord appeared.

cnv.text: 會眾聚集攻擊摩西和亞倫的時候，他們轉身向會幕觀看，見有雲彩遮蓋會幕，耶和華的榮光顯現出來。

ccb.text: 会众聚集起来反对摩西和亚伦，他们向会幕观看，忽然有云彩遮盖了会幕，耶和华的荣光显现了。
